# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
def score(age, frequency, recency, size, cache_size, now):
    """Higher score = keep; lowest-scored resident is evicted.
    age        = now - insert_time
    frequency  = total access count while resident
    recency    = now - last_access_time
    size       = item size (1 in the uniform-cost experiments)
    cache_size = capacity (constant within a run)
    now        = current logical timestamp
    """
    # Balanced Hybrid Policy: Weighted Frequency + Normalized Recency (ARC-style).
    # 1. Frequency (x100): Strong primary driver to retain popular items in stable_frequency 
    #    and churn workloads. Scaled to match the magnitude of recency values.
    # 2. Normalized Recency (recency / (age + 1)): 
    #    - Rewards recent access (helps temporal_locality_hitrate).
    #    - Scales down the impact of recency as the item ages. This prevents 
    #      "stale popular" items from dominating over "fresh" items in scan/churn scenarios,
    #      and balances the scales better than raw addition.
    return (frequency * 100) + (recency / (age + 1))
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
